bitbucket: pushed to Novateur/vlincs_reid_by_search on branch wisc with reproducibility package; see git log for commit hash
environment: No anchors; GT labels only used after materialization for full-score evaluation
implementation: Reused the no-anchor component-subset proposer with custom top-k candidates 22,24,26,28,30,32,34,36. Direct scoring showed top32 as the best neighbor. The top32 delivery path keeps the same fixed density_simple and p005_area gates as the previous promoted result, so the gain is a boundary refinement rather than a new delivery heuristic.
module_detail: M7 refines the component-subset retrieval boundary around top28; M8 commits the top32 source island into component 86; M12 validates density_simple plus p005_area delivery.
next: Continue beyond local top-k boundary search: test interaction with additional component repairs and run a preemptible Pluto batch for broader side-effect-aware subsets. Still below the 0.70 end-to-end target.

reproduction.note: This replays the delivered identity decision. Full candidate regeneration also needs the feature caches listed in artifact_manifest.json.
requires: DATA_ROOT with DS1 GT under Box/VLINCS_Performer/MS01/MC0001/2024-03-Tc6 and 2024-03-Tc8

summary: A local top-k boundary search around the promoted top28 bridge found that top32 recovers four additional compatible component-37 tracklets. Rank06 top32 improves valid p005_area from 0.668146/0.528669/0.539001 to 0.668198/0.528747/0.539071.
title: No-anchor rank06 top32 subset 37->86 p005 gain
used_in_pipeline: yes: promoted as current no-anchor best after valid p005_area scoring

visual_cases.failure_reason: Top28 omitted four compatible high-similarity tracklets near the boundary.
visual_cases.improvement: Top32 includes those four tracklets and improves direct, density, and p005 delivery.
visual_cases.summary: 32 moved tracklets with three sampled frames each. Shows predicted_global_id 96000040 -> 960000350 and component 37 -> 86. Raw frame pixels are absent locally, so this is coordinate-only fallback evidence.
visual_cases.title: Rank06 top32 subset: component 37 -> 86

visual_cases.failure_reason: Coordinate-only panels cannot show appearance cues.
visual_cases.improvement: The package carries real-frame context alongside coordinate evidence until rank06 raw frames are available.
visual_cases.summary: Previously extracted real-frame montage showing what a true global-id evidence chain should look like when raw frames are available.
visual_cases.title: Real-frame context: cross-camera global-id success

visual_cases.failure_reason: Single-frame diagnostics do not show temporal consistency.
visual_cases.improvement: Timeline panels show repeated-frame evidence for a global-id decision.
visual_cases.summary: Real-frame tracklet timeline from the earlier detailed report, used as a visual reference for bbox crops and repeated-frame support.
visual_cases.title: Real-frame context: same tracklet sequence

workflow_steps.action: Score six new boundary points and compare against top28.
Run density_simple and then fixed p005_area because direct/density both beat top28.
Write README, PPT-style HTML, spec, cases and ablation table.
